mapper.select: select table_id, table_name, table_comment, sub_table_name, sub_table_fk_name, class_name, tpl_category, tpl_web_type, package_name, module_name, business_name, function_name, function_author, gen_type, gen_path, options, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from gen_table where table_id = #{tableId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into gen_table(id,table_name, table_comment, sub_table_name, sub_table_fk_name, class_name, tpl_category, tpl_web_type, package_name, module_name, business_name, function_name, function_author, gen_type, gen_path, options, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) values (#{entity.id},#{tableName}, #{tableComment}, #{subTableName}, #{subTableFkName}, #{className}, #{tplCategory}, #{tplWebType}, #{packageName}, #{moduleName}, #{businessName}, #{functionName}, #{functionAuthor}, #{genType}, #{genPath}, #{options}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark})

insert into gen_table(id,table_name, table_comment, sub_table_name, sub_table_fk_name, class_name, tpl_category, tpl_web_type, package_name, module_name, business_name, function_name, function_author, gen_type, gen_path, options, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.tableName}, #{entity.tableComment}, #{entity.subTableName}, #{entity.subTableFkName}, #{entity.className}, #{entity.tplCategory}, #{entity.tplWebType}, #{entity.packageName}, #{entity.moduleName}, #{entity.businessName}, #{entity.functionName}, #{entity.functionAuthor}, #{entity.genType}, #{entity.genPath}, #{entity.options}, #{entity.createBy}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateBy}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.remark})

insert into gen_table(id,table_name, table_comment, sub_table_name, sub_table_fk_name, class_name, tpl_category, tpl_web_type, package_name, module_name, business_name, function_name, function_author, gen_type, gen_path, options, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.tableName}, #{entity.tableComment}, #{entity.subTableName}, #{entity.subTableFkName}, #{entity.className}, #{entity.tplCategory}, #{entity.tplWebType}, #{entity.packageName}, #{entity.moduleName}, #{entity.businessName}, #{entity.functionName}, #{entity.functionAuthor}, #{entity.genType}, #{entity.genPath}, #{entity.options}, #{entity.createBy}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateBy}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.remark})
on duplicate key update table_name = values(table_name), table_comment = values(table_comment), sub_table_name = values(sub_table_name), sub_table_fk_name = values(sub_table_fk_name), class_name = values(class_name), tpl_category = values(tpl_category), tpl_web_type = values(tpl_web_type), package_name = values(package_name), module_name = values(module_name), business_name = values(business_name), function_name = values(function_name), function_author = values(function_author), gen_type = values(gen_type), gen_path = values(gen_path), options = values(options), create_by = values(create_by), create_time = values(create_time), update_by = values(update_by), update_time = values(update_time), remark = values(remark)
